name: Orsola Aquinas
description: A blond, blue eyed Necessarius nun from Italy and a skilled decoder. She was originally a famous Roman Catholic nun but was marked for death when it was revealed she was able to decrypt the "Liber AL vel Legis" grimoire which contain dangerous magic, which unknown to the church, she was actually decrypting the grimoire in order to the destroy the book itself. Fearing for her life, she sought the protection of the Amakusa Catholics but ran away from them as well as she didn't trust them and feare

name: Osamu Tamura
description: Osamu Tamura, or 'Parou', started cross-dressing in middle school because he wanted to attract Shibuya, a heterosexual boy. ~!After Osamu confesses to him, Shibuya agrees on going out with him but only when he's dressed as a girl. They start sleeping together and Osamu even keeps visiting him when Shibuya no longer goes to school after failing to get into a high-ranked high school. Although blaming it on him and treating him like dirt, Osamu stays attached.!~

name: Piisuke
description: A small yellow parrot owned by Heisuke Mashimo, acting as his spotter.

name: Piyomon
description: She is the partner of Sora Takenouchi. She is very sweet, cheerful and caring. She evolves from Yokomon, and eventually evolves to Birdramon and then Garudamon.

name: Reina Vance
description: The nomad warrior Reina is the direct heir to the house of Vance and Claudette's and Elina's sister. But, instead of accepting her father's heritage, she escapes and enters the Queen's Blade tournament. Her partially naive character and strong sense of justice gets her into trouble pretty often.

name: Rose
description: Not much is known about Rose beyond the fact that she is a young dragon, and thus still unable to change her form. When she is first released from the case, the crime syndicate "Fang" was transporting her. She does not know how to speak and can only say Ryuuji's name, but soon picks up a few words (mostly learning from TV and Eriko). name: Ruri Akutsu
description: Akuru's little sister who is in the fifth grade. Ruri is a hardworking elementary school student who devotes her time to studying and she is determined to become smart and dependable. Despite this, she utterly fails at nearly everything she does, which prompts Yoshiko Hanabatake to see her as a fellow "idiot". Much like Akuru Akutsu (Ruri's older brother), Ruri dislikes Yoshiko and she is mortified at the idea of becoming just like her. Unlike Yoshiko, Ruri has a good amount of common sense, tho

name: Ryou Machiko
description: A polite second-year middle-schooler who is skilled at cooking. Living alone since her beloved grandmother passed away. Both parents are working overseas. Is reliable, but has difficulty depending on others.

name: Sayo Shinoyama
description: Sayo Shinoyama is the second eldest granddaughter of Rozan Shinoyama. Currently unemployed, she lives at the Shinoyama mansion.

name: Seira Otoshiro
description: A brand new idol from Dream Academy. Seira has a musical background from performing with a number of instruments including the violin, piano, guitar, and probably so much more! At first she played classical music but later fell in love with rock music. Before becoming an idol she used to be in a rock band with her friends. Her family also owns a cafe and runs a bakery. Her preferred brand is Swing Rock.

name: Tsurugi Higashikata
description: Tsurugi Higashikata, the youngest member of the Higashikata family, is the son of Jobin and Mitsuba Higashikata. Tsurugi's stand, Paper Moon King, allows him to transform objects into origami and create illusions.
